broadcastBody.cafe: Happy hour today, 5pm to 7pm. Show your card for 20% off.
broadcastBody.restaurant: Tonight's menu is served until 10pm. Book your table now.
broadcastBody.bakery: Fresh pastries out of the oven this morning. Come grab one.
broadcastBody.beauty: This week: 15% off all treatments. Book your slot.
broadcastBody.retail: New collection in store. Come and have a look today.
broadcastBody.fitness: New group class added this week. Reserve your spot.
broadcastBody.services: Free quote until the end of the month. Get in touch.
broadcastBody.other: Something new to share. Stop by this week.

errors.unknownStep: We can't find that setup step. Let's start from the beginning.
errors.slugInvalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
errors.createFailed: Something went wrong setting up your business. Please try again.
errors.rewardRequired: Set the reward customers will earn.

welcome.title: Welcome to Stampeo
welcome.subtitle: Your digital loyalty card, ready in about 10 minutes.
welcome.body: We'll build your card, install it on your own phone, send you a real stamp, and let you broadcast your first message. By the end you'll know exactly what your customers will see, feel, and do. Then you choose a plan.

identity.title: Identity
identity.subtitle: The basics. We use this on your card, your customer page, and your dashboard.

fields.name: Business name
fields.nameHelp: The name your customers see on their card.
fields.slugHelp: Your customer page will live at stampeo.app/{slug}. Pick something short and memorable.
fields.websiteHelp: Shown on the back of your card.
fields.logoHelp: Landscape, up to 3:1 ratio. PNG or JPG.

profile.title: Tell us about your business
profile.subtitle: Four quick questions so we can tailor the card style, defaults, and reports to your industry.
profile.heardFromLabel: How did you hear about us?

program.title: Set up your loyalty program
program.subtitle: Pick how customers earn, name your program, and define the reward.

data-collection.title: What to collect from customers
data-collection.subtitle: Pick the fields on your sign-up form. Fewer fields means more sign-ups.

intro.title: Your card has two sides
intro.subtitle: Front for stamps. Back for everything else.
intro.bodyP1: Customers flip the card to see your hours, address, phone, website, terms, and anything else worth showing. On Apple Wallet they tap the three dots. On Google Wallet they tap the i icon.
intro.bodyP2: You'll add your details once, here. They'll be available on every card you ever create. Later, when you design a specific card, you can pick which details to show and add extras that only apply to that card.

info.title: Your business details
info.subtitle: Available on every card. We've pre-filled what we already know from your account.

branding.title: Logo and colors
branding.subtitle: Drop in your logo, pick your colors. The defaults work; you can refine anytime.

stamps.title: Stamps and rewards
stamps.subtitle: Pick stamp and reward icons, then choose your color.

content.title: Extra info on the front
content.subtitle: Short fields next to the stamps. The reward, an expiry, a limit, anything worth showing.
content.technicalNote: On Apple Wallet these appear below the stamps. On Google Wallet they appear above the QR code.

back.title: What appears on the back of this card
back.subtitle: Pick which business details to show. Add anything that only applies to this card.
back.sharedSectionHelper: Tick the ones to show on this card.
back.specificSectionHelper: Fields you add here only appear on this card.
back.specificEmpty: Nothing yet. Add a field that should only appear on this card.

icon.title: Choose your notification icon
icon.subtitle: Shown next to every notification you send: stamp added, reward earned, broadcast.
icon.uploadHint: PNG, minimum 87×87 pixels. Square shapes work best.
icon.previewBody: Stamp collected! You have 3 of 10 stamps.

cropWarning.title: Crop your icon
cropWarning.body: Your image isn't square. Crop it before continuing, or upload a different one.

first-stamp.title: Take it for a spin
first-stamp.chapterIntro: Install your card. Then send yourself a real stamp.

install.title: Your card is ready. Let's try it.
install.subtitle: Go through the exact flow your customers will.
install.loadingHint: Just a few seconds. Stay here.
install.explanation: The link below opens your customer page. It's where people land after scanning your QR code or tapping your link, and where they sign up for your loyalty program.
install.explanationActionDesktop: Scan the QR with your phone, sign up as your first customer, and your card will land in your wallet. Come back here when it's installed.
install.explanationActionMobile: Tap the link to open your customer page, sign up as your first customer, and your card will land in your wallet. Come back here when it's installed.
install.qrBody: Later, print it for your counter or drop it on a menu so customers can sign up themselves.
install.quickInstallTitle: Just want the card? Skip the customer page
install.quickInstallBody: We can install it directly using your account info. You'll save a minute, but you'll miss seeing the customer flow.
install.installTitle: Add the card to your wallet
install.installBody: Tap a button below. The card lands in your wallet, ready for the test stamp on the next step.
install.pollingHint: Keep this tab open. We detect the sign-up automatically.
install.watchingInstall: Customer detected. Waiting for the card to land in your wallet…
install.manualConfirmCta: I've added it to my wallet
install.detected: Card installed. Moving on in a moment.
install.installedSummary: {count, plural, =1 {Your card is installed on 1 device.} other {Your card is installed on # devices.}}
install.timeoutBody: We paused listening for new sign-ups after 5 minutes. Tap retry to keep watching.

stamp.title: Send yourself a stamp
stamp.subtitle: Each tap fires a real notification to your phone. Exactly what your customers will get.
stamp.prereqBody: Go back to the previous step and add the card to your wallet. Without it, no notification can land.
stamp.readyBody: Tap below. Your phone buzzes within a few seconds.
stamp.firstStampLandedBody: That's exactly what your customers will feel every time you stamp them. Same buzz, same timing, same flow. Send one more to get the rhythm.
stamp.keepStampingBody: Another tap fires a second real notification. The short wait between them is what keeps each one buzzing on its own.
stamp.demoCompleteTitle: You've got the feel for it
stamp.demoCompleteBody: Whenever you're ready, we'll move on.
stamp.appleWalletHint: Apple Wallet groups rapid updates. Leaving roughly 20 seconds between stamps gives each notification its own buzz.
stamp.googleWalletHint: On Google Wallet, the card only refreshes once closed. Close and reopen to see the new stamp.

deliveryDisclosure.summary: Notification didn't appear? The stamp was still recorded.
deliveryDisclosure.appleBody: Apple groups updates based on battery, Wi-Fi, and cellular conditions. A banner may take seconds or minutes. The card on your lock screen refreshes as soon as your phone wakes with a good signal.
deliveryDisclosure.googleBody: The card only refreshes after it's been closed. Close the wallet and reopen the card to see the new stamp.
deliveryDisclosure.reassuranceBody: Even if the notification or the card preview hasn't caught up, the count is already on our server. Next time you scan this customer, you'll see the real, up-to-date count.

stamp.multiDeviceHint: {count, plural, =1 {} other {Each tap stamps all # installed devices at once.}}
stamp.fallback: No buzz yet? Notifications can take a few seconds. Try again in a moment.
stamp.customisationHint: This is the default message. You can rewrite it, add custom messages at specific stamp counts, or turn notifications off entirely from your notifications settings.

intro.title: Broadcasts, explained
intro.subtitle: One message you send manually to every customer who has your card.
intro.whatItIsBody: A single notification sent to every customer who has your card installed. Useful for limited-time offers, events, new menu items, or anything you'd post on social media.
intro.differentFromBody: Stamp and reward notifications fire by themselves when something happens. Broadcasts are the opposite: you decide when, you decide what.
intro.audienceOfOneTitle: Right now your audience is you
intro.audienceOfOneBody: The only installed card so far is yours, so this broadcast will land on your own phone. That's the same experience your audience will get later.

compose.title: Write a broadcast
compose.subtitle: One short message. It lands on your phone the moment you tap send.
compose.composeBody: Write something you'd actually send to customers. It lands straight on their phone and on the back of their card.
compose.titleHint: Shows in bold on the lock screen. Be specific. Defaults to your program name.
compose.bodyPlaceholder: Happy hour today, 5pm to 7pm. Show your card for 20% off.
compose.recipientsLine: {count, plural, =0 {No installed cards yet. Try the previous step first.} =1 {This will land on your own phone.} other {# installed customers will receive this.}}
compose.sendCta: {count, plural, =1 {Send to my phone} other {Send to # customers}}
compose.sendFailed: The broadcast couldn't be sent. Try again in a moment.
compose.deliveredTitle: {count, plural, =0 {No pushes delivered yet} =1 {Pushed to your phone} other {Pushed to # devices}}
compose.deliveredHint: {count, plural, =1 {Same exact experience your customers will get when you broadcast to an audience.} other {{delivered} of {total} customers got the push. {skipped, plural, =0 {} =1 {1 customer skipped, card not installed.} other {# customers skipped, card not installed.}}}}

team.title: Bring in your team
team.subtitle: Two access levels, depending on what each person needs to do.

adminRole.label: Admin
adminRole.description: Handles customers, sends broadcasts, and invites people. Can't change the loyalty rules, edit cards, or touch billing. Good for managers and marketing staff.

scannerRole.label: Scanner
scannerRole.description: Stamps customers from a dedicated app on their phone. No dashboard, no customer data, no settings. Good for staff working the counter.

team.inviteHint: They get an email invitation. You can revoke their access anytime.

recap.title: You've built a real loyalty program
recap.subtitle: Real card, real phones, real notifications. Quick recap before we talk plans.
recap.stampsLabel: {count, plural, =0 {No stamps sent yet} =1 {1 stamp sent to your phone} other {# stamps sent to your phone}}
recap.teamLabel: {count, plural, =0 {Team: just you for now} =1 {Team: you and 1 invitation pending} other {Team: you and # invitations pending}}

plan.title: Choose your plan
plan.subtitle: Pick a plan now, or keep exploring on your 30-day Pro trial. You can change anytime.
plan.subtitleFounding: Founding partners get 50% off, locked in for as long as your subscription stays active. Pick a plan now to claim the rate, or keep exploring on your 30-day Pro trial.
plan.confirmBodyReverts: On {tierName}, some of what you set up during your Pro trial will change:
plan.confirmBodyNoLosses: Everything you've set up will work on {tierName}.
